title: ctenitis reunionensis
intro: Ctenitis reunionensis, also known as Reunion fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ctenitis reunionensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antiviral activity. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
